title: Korner SMP
description: An Origins & Vanilla+ modpack made for smaller multiplayer servers.
body:
### What's this modpack about?
This is a modpack I originally made for my private SMP, it aims to be a vanilla+ experience along with the origins mod; keeping the gameplay mainly vanilla with some small tweaks. The modpack includes many optimisation mods to ensure it can run on nearly any modern computer, with some graphics mods for some eye-candy.

### Use cases for this modpack
[The Origins mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) is the centerpiece of this modpack, as the mod works best on multiplayer servers with a small to medium group of friends. That is also the target audience of this mod; smaller community servers consisting of 3-20 players. A server can also be run with these same mods, though in that case I recommend adding more server-side optimisation mods

Included in the modpack are also building oriented mods such as Litematica and Axiom, which are disabled by default, but can be enabled in the Modrinth app. The point of them being included is to be used in a creative single-player world where you can plan the builds that you make on another world, whether it be a server or a single player survival world.

This modpack has a lot of features, but here's a summary of every important aspect:

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- [Origins mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) to allow players choosing their race.
- All vanilla structures remade via YUNG's improved structures
- The world generation is much larger and varied thanks to [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) and [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith).
- Many features from newer versions are ported to this modpack's version (1.20.1), like [autocrafters](https://modrinth.com/mod/autocrafter-early) and [tuff variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/tuffblocks).
- Some other autocrafter types are also added from the [the autocrafters mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/autocrafters)
- [The ender dragon fight remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/edf-remastered) makes fighting the ender dragon much more epic and fun for many people to fight at once.
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) allows the player to see much farther than normal, which is also necessary to enjoy the new terrain generation to its fullest.
- QoL features such as [Durability Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/durabilityviewer) to allow monitoring tool and armor durability, [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) to show saturation, disabled [double tapping w](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-tap) to sprint, [dynamic lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-lights) which actually produces light levels from held items and more.
- [The friends and foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) mod, which adds everything from all past mob- and feature votes that weren't added, like crabs and copper golems.
- [Do a barrel roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) - A fun mod that allows for realistic elytra flight, can be disabled at will.
- New [Soul fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-fire-d) enchantments and tweaks to being set on fire by it.
- [Better Ladders](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ladders) can be placed without a wall behind it
- [Blastproof Netherite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blastproof-netherite) - Netherite items cannot be destroyed by explosions or the void
- [F3 Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) is much cleaner
- [What are they up to](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to) allows other players to see what you are doing in a menu like a chest or in your inventory.
- This modpack comes with many shaders already installed like [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) and [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)

</details>
